build.beforeDevCommand: LAN_IP=$(ipconfig getifaddr en0 || ipconfig getifaddr en1 || echo 127.0.0.1); NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://$LAN_IP:3847 NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_BASE_URL=ws://$LAN_IP:3847 pnpm --filter @hivelaunch/web dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: LAN_IP=$(ipconfig getifaddr en0 || ipconfig getifaddr en1 || echo 127.0.0.1); TAURI_STATIC_EXPORT=1 NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://$LAN_IP:3847 NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_BASE_URL=ws://$LAN_IP:3847 pnpm --filter @hivelaunch/web build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://localhost:* http://192.168.*:* ws://192.168.*:* ws://127.0.0.1:*
